narrative_beat: Overhead de xicara de cafe fumegante ao lado de carta dobrada, luz dourada lateral, cozinha simples P&B

style_reference.textual_description: dark cinematic chiaroscuro, Caravaggio-inspired, foreground in rich warm tones (crimson, amber, gold) with background in desaturated black-and-white, film grain, candlelight, floating orange embers

subject.primary: a ceramic coffee cup with dark espresso steaming visibly, sitting on a worn wooden kitchen table next to a folded handwritten letter sealed with crimson wax, both items glowing in warm amber light from the left
subject.focal_point: the rising steam from the coffee cup catching golden light
subject.secondary: a weathered wooden spoon, crumbs of bread, edge of a simple tablecloth

environment.location: a humble Brazilian kitchen, simple tile counter visible at edge
environment.time_of_day: early morning, golden side light from a window
environment.atmosphere: intimate, domestic, the weight of decision in an ordinary moment

composition.foreground: coffee cup and letter in warm amber and ochre tones
composition.midground: worn wooden table surface with grain visible
composition.background: desaturated black-and-white kitchen tiles and counter blurred at edges

lighting.key_light: warm golden side light from left, raking across table surface
lighting.fill_light: faint amber glow from coffee liquid surface
lighting.rim_light: gold highlight on cup rim and letter edge
lighting.shadow_quality: long soft shadows stretching right across the table

style.post_processing: halation, crushed blacks, amber highlights, anamorphic lens flares
style.texture_detail: 35mm film grain, visible wood grain, steam wisps, faint floating embers

mood.emotion: eighty-five seconds is the time to drink a coffee — or make a decision

symbolism.primary: ordinary life intersecting with cosmic deadline

negative_as_positive: clean frame without visible text or watermarks
photorealistic documentary cinematography, not illustrated or cartoon
analog film photography aesthetic, no digital art flatness
muted desaturated background palette, warm saturated foreground only

multimodal_inputs.instruction: Transfer color palette, lighting, grain, atmosphere only. Do not copy composition.
